title: BEM-924 final protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM924_FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL.md with content # BEM-924 FINAL WORKING SYSTEM PROTOCOL
Status: FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS
Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: one unified implementation contract for evolving the repository from current partial governance baseline to a working managing system.
Operator correction:
- Previous protocol versions were fragmented and did not provide a complete path to working state.
- This protocol is not Telegram-only, not provider-only and not prompt-only.
- It synthesizes protocol v1.7, actual repository state, Claude audits, BEM-907..BEM-913 remediation, BEM-919..BEM-923 drafts and all operator decisions from 2026-05-30.
Definition of working system:
- Operator submits task through registered channel.
- Task enters General Director Curator route.
- Policy and dispatch route the task.
- Provider-aware internal contour lifecycle executes: Analyst proposal -> Auditor gate -> Executor -> Auditor result gate with revision cycles through Analyst.
- Provider model is recorded: GPT Analyst, Claude Auditor, Claude Executor primary; GPT-Codex/Codex fallback for Claude roles on limits/unavailability.
- Event log and managed channel update every transition.
- Proof includes non-null CI/Git release evidence.
- Operator receives canonical report.
- Claude can verify the release bundle.
Roadmap:
- BEM-925 SSOT identity/provider layer.
- BEM-926 rule and experience layer.
- BEM-927 envelope and channel layer.
- BEM-928 dispatch lifecycle layer.
- BEM-929 object/contour execution layer.
- BEM-930 proof and CI layer.
- BEM-931 Telegram operator layer.
- BEM-932 E2E validation layer.
- BEM-933 Claude re-audit and release package.
